sourcesContent:

import { generateStages } from './mock-data.helpers';

  .map(s => ({ ...s, status: 'completed' as const }));

const stgDelayedBus   = generateStages('2025-11-20', 'delayed', 'Buses');
const stgOntimeAutos2 = generateStages('2025-12-15', 'ontime', 'Autos');
